api.authDescription: Bearer token obtained via OAuth 2.0 authorization.
api.bodyFallback: Request body — see code example below.
api.intro.title: API Reference
api.intro.desc: Browse and explore the Longbridge OpenAPI HTTP endpoints. Select an endpoint from the sidebar to view parameters, request examples, and response schemas.
api.intro.httpDesc: This reference covers HTTP-based APIs for trading, quotes, and portfolio management. All endpoints require OAuth 2.0 Bearer token authentication.
api.intro.wsDesc: Real-time data such as live quotes and order status updates are delivered via WebSocket or TCP connections.
api.intro.hint: Select an endpoint from the sidebar to get started
parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.noParameters: No parameters required for this API
authorization.title: Authorization
IRVNYbFKip3CIbruOx4-4: Support all product types in HK, US, and CN markets
Uqmclqxw6dQbP3jwc6G7e: Advanced quotes such as Level 2 and National BBO are available
5diFZtxSkEDAgBUnWcKb5: Support access to historical candlestick quotes data
_mlScbvyg8lDxhHsROlbK: Support the trading of stocks, options, bonds, funds, and other products in the US&HK markets
4iQqxIDsChn9iZmM5571k: Supports multiple order types such as general order, conditional order, and attach order
M8nA_Jg5s7ucI5fLT93x0: Functions include placing orders, amending orders, canceling orders, viewing account positions and funds
igUuE7b16XAv4XV1cz2Uo1: Support LLM standards, including LLMs Text, MCP etc., for you to easily use AI to build your idea.
OG258Y1lxxNYjOsg6gH4K: Open an account to receive HK market LV2 quotes and CN market LV1 quotes for free
authorization.autoFill: Auto filled with simulated account authorization information
hero.subtitle: Real-time market data, trading, and financial intelligence — delivered through {sdk}, {cli}, {skill}, {mcp}, and {openapi} for developers worldwide.
stats.sdks.detail: Python, Node.js, Rust, Java, C, C++, Go
arch.title: Platform Architecture
arch.subtitle: One gateway, every access method — from SDK to real-time WebSocket streams
core.title: Developer Tools
core.subtitle: Everything you need to build, test, and ship financial applications
core.cli.title: CLI
core.cli.desc: AI-native terminal tool with interactive TUI dashboard, 50+ commands, and --format json output for scripting and AI agent integration.
core.skill.title: AI Skill
core.skill.desc: Investment analysis agent for real-time quotes, portfolio data, news sentiment, and market intelligence — works with any AI platform.
core.mcp.title: MCP
core.mcp.desc: Hosted MCP service with OAuth 2.1 — zero-config integration for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Zed, and Cherry Studio.
core.sdk.title: SDK
core.sdk.desc: Get your first quote in minutes. 7 languages — Python, Node.js, Rust, Go, Java, C, C++ — with async support and built-in rate control.
core.paper.title: Paper Trading
core.paper.desc: Test orders with real market data at zero cost. Simulated matching based on live bid-ask spreads, no securities account required.
core.llm.title: LLM Ready
core.llm.desc: llms.txt standard compliance, all docs available as .md for RAG pipelines, and Accept: text/markdown header support on longbridge.com.
product.cli.title: Longbridge CLI
product.cli.subtitle: AI-native command-line tool covering every OpenAPI endpoint
product.cli.desc: Designed for scripting, AI-agent tool-calling, and daily workflows from the terminal.
product.cli.feat1: 50+ commands for market data, trading, fundamentals, and portfolio
product.cli.feat2: Interactive TUI dashboard with live candlestick charts and watchlist
product.cli.feat3: --format json output for scripting and AI agent integration
product.cli.feat4: OAuth 2.0 device flow — works in SSH and headless servers
product.skill.title: AI Skill
product.skill.subtitle: Unlock market insights, deep research and intelligent trading for your AI
product.skill.desc: With Longbridge Skill, your AI assistant can screen stocks, decode earnings, track insider moves, and place orders — all in plain conversation.
product.skill.install.label: Install in seconds
product.skill.verify: Verify: "Use Longbridge to get the current quote for AAPL"
product.skill.cap1.title: Cross-Market Screener
product.skill.cap1.desc: Screen HK, US, A-shares, and SG stocks simultaneously with fundamental and technical filters
product.skill.cap1.example: Find US and HK tech stocks with market cap above $50B, P/E below 25, and a recent MACD golden cross
product.skill.cap2.title: Technical Diagnosis
product.skill.cap2.desc: Pull daily, hourly, and 15-min candlestick data with MACD, KDJ, RSI analysis
product.skill.cap2.example: Diagnose TSLA's technicals: daily trend, support/resistance levels, and short-term signals
product.skill.cap3.title: Earnings Deep Dive
product.skill.cap3.desc: Unpack earnings in 5 minutes: actuals vs estimates, revenue breakdown, valuation metrics
product.skill.cap3.example: NVDA just reported — compare actuals vs analyst estimates and break down revenue by segment
product.skill.cap4.title: Smart Money Tracker
product.skill.cap4.desc: Track insider trading and institutional ownership shifts across fund types
product.skill.cap4.example: Check AAPL's recent insider trading — are executives selling? How did hedge fund positions change?
product.skill.cap5.title: Advanced Orders
product.skill.cap5.desc: Place conditional orders, trailing stops, and options in conversational syntax
product.skill.cap5.example: Set a trailing stop on TSLA: trigger a sell if it drops more than 8%, show details before executing
product.skill.cap6.title: Portfolio Review
product.skill.cap6.desc: Comprehensive P&L analysis: trend, position ranking, allocation breakdown
product.skill.cap6.example: Review my portfolio this month: P&L trend, biggest winner, worst drag, US vs HK allocation
product.mcp.title: MCP
product.mcp.subtitle: Connect your AI assistant to live market data — no API keys required
product.mcp.desc: Hosted HTTP MCP service with OAuth 2.1 authentication. Your AI coding assistant gets real-time quotes, account info, and trading capabilities in one connection.
cap.title: API Capabilities
cap.subtitle: Everything you need to build trading and market data applications
cap.quote.desc: Real-time quotes, order depth, candlestick, intraday, capital flow, and push subscriptions
cap.trade.desc: Submit, replace, and withdraw orders. Track positions, balance, and execution history
cap.derivatives.desc: Full option chains with Greeks, warrants listing, and real-time derivative quotes
cap.research.desc: Financial statements, valuation metrics, dividend history, EPS forecasts, and analyst ratings
cap.content.desc: Real-time news feeds, community discussions, topics, and engagement metrics
stats.ainative.detail: MCP, AI Skill, CLI JSON output, llms.txt
